name: TEN Holdings, Inc.
business: TEN Holdings is a provider of event planning, production, and broadcasting services. It produces virtual, hybrid, self-service, and physical events. It primarily generates revenue from virtual and hybrid events delivered to corporate customers.

exposures.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we entered a technical partnership with webinar.net, an Xcyte Digital company, to bring to market our next-generation webcasting platform, TEN Pro, which offers numerous improvements over our prior Xyvid Pro platform, including AI-based live captioning and translation.

catalysts.event: Technical partnership with webinar.net to launch TEN Pro platform
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we entered a technical partnership with webinar.net, an Xcyte Digital company, to bring to market our next-generation webcasting platform, TEN Pro.

catalysts.event: Expansion of AI-based captioning and translation from 8 to over 70 languages
catalysts.sentence: For example, in the first quarter of 2026 we expanded our AI based captioning and translation from 8 to over 70 languages, as well as introducing a speech to text feature where global audience members can hear the translation as opposed to needing to split their focus between reading the live transcript and the presentation content.
